info.name: Didactio Backend
info.description: Single ordered runner flow for the Didactio backend. Set the collection variable `provider` to `openai` or `deepseek` before running the suite. Requests marked `AI GEN` are the ones that invoke model generation directly.

exec: pm.test('Health payload exposes service status', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql('didactio-backend'); });
pm.test('Health payload exposes mongo state', function () { pm.expect(body.mongo).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.mongo.connected).to.be.a('boolean'); });
pm.test('Create Unit Init returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('Unit init is created in submitted state', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('submitted'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('moderate_topic'); });
pm.test('Moderate Unit Init returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Unit init moves to moderation completed', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('moderation_completed'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.moderatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Questionnaire is ready with core questions', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('questionnaire_ready'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('answer_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.questionnaire.questions).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(body.questionnaire.questions.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
pm.test('Generate Syllabus Prompt returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Generate Syllabus returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Generated syllabus is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('syllabus_ready'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('review_syllabus'); pm.expect(body.syllabus).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.syllabus.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.learningGoals).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Syllabus generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Syllabus Generation Runs returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('At least one syllabus run is stored', function () { pm.expect(body.runs).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

pm.test('Latest syllabus run matches expected status', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.status).to.eql(expectedStatus); pm.expect(latestRun.provider).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.model).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.prompt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Completed syllabus run includes syllabus payload', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.syllabus).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(latestRun.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Failed syllabus run includes debug payload', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.rawOutput).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Updated syllabus is stored before approval', function () { pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('approve_syllabus'); pm.expect(body.syllabus.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

pm.test('Syllabus approval advances the lifecycle', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('syllabus_approved'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_unit_content'); pm.expect(body.syllabusApprovedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('List Didactic Units returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Approved syllabus creates a didactic unit record', function () { pm.expect(body.didacticUnits).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const latestUnit = body.didacticUnits[0]; pm.expect(latestUnit.unitInitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('unitInitId')); pm.expect(latestUnit.status).to.eql('ready_for_content_generation'); pm.expect(latestUnit.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestUnit.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.collectionVariables.set('didacticUnitId', latestUnit.id); });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit By Id returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Single didactic unit payload is complete', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.unitInitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('unitInitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('ready_for_content_generation'); pm.expect(body.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

item.name: 10c AI GEN Generate Didactic Unit Chapter

exec: pm.test('Generate Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter generation is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.generatedChapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapter = body.generatedChapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(chapter.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Didactic unit chapter generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Generate Chapter Content returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Generated chapter is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.generatedChapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapter = body.generatedChapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(chapter.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Chapter generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Chapter Generation Runs returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('At least one chapter run is stored', function () { pm.expect(body.runs).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

pm.test('Latest chapter run is completed and inspectable', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.status).to.eql('completed'); pm.expect(latestRun.chapterIndex).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(latestRun.prompt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(latestRun.chapter.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get All Generation Runs returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('All generation runs include syllabus and chapter stages', function () { pm.expect(body.runs).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const stages = body.runs.map((run) => run.stage); pm.expect(stages).to.include('syllabus'); pm.expect(stages).to.include('chapter'); });

pm.test('Latest unified run is inspectable', function () { const latestRun = body.runs[0]; pm.expect(latestRun.provider).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.model).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.prompt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.stage).to.be.oneOf(['syllabus', 'chapter']); });
pm.test('Get Generated Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Generated chapter payload is complete', function () { pm.expect(body.chapterIndex).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(body.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Chapter List returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Chapter list exposes generation flags', function () { pm.expect(body.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapter = body.chapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.hasGeneratedContent).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Update Generated Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Updated chapter is stored', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Edited Foundations'); pm.expect(body.updatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Unit Init returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Fetched unit-init reflects later lifecycle state', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('unitInitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('List Unit Inits returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('List Unit Inits returns an array', function () { pm.expect(body.unitInits).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Create Unit Init (OpenAI) returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Create Unit Init (DeepSeek) returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

variable.value: I want to build production-ready applications with Next.js
